page: Microsoft Azure DC32es_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEV5 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server features 32 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 CPU architecture. It is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include any local storage, meaning all storage operations must utilize external volumes, though the hardware is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are no integrated GPUs present on this instance, and it comes with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The DC32es_v5 is classified within the memory-optimized category, making it suitable for database deployments, enterprise applications, and memory-sensitive workloads that rely on network-attached storage. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable compute performance without resource sharing.
description: The Microsoft Azure DC32es_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine within the DCEV5 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring reliance on external Premium Storage and rendering it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated tasks. It also provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed as a memory-optimized resource, the DC32es_v5 is structured for enterprise workloads, database hosting, and memory-sensitive applications that utilize network-attached storage. Its dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance for multi-threaded business applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC32es_v5 is a DCEV5-family virtual machine with 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 128.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC32es_v5 is a memory-optimized VM featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability under Hyper-V.
tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core virtual machine featuring one hundred twenty-eight gigabytes of memory and premium external storage compatibility.
